crime.value: Murder of Sara's father by four armed men on a roadside in Mexico
crime.quote: I look over my shoulder just in time to see my father being shot, and dropping to the ground, dead.

victim.value: Sara's father - targeted by armed men who came specifically to kill him
victim.quote: Those men are going to kill me. Ill keep them busy enough for you to run.

culprit_and_motive.value: Four armed men - motive unclear, appears to be targeted assassination
culprit_and_motive.quote: there is four men comming twords our car, guns drawn

investigator.value: Sara - the victim's daughter who witnessed the murder and is now on the run
investigator.quote: I run as fast as I can, but look over my shoulder just in time to see my father being shot

social_world.value: Criminal organization with FBI pursuing protagonist; power imbalance between fugitive and authorities
social_world.quote: Those men are going to kill me. Ill keep them busy enough for you to run. Dont trust anyaone.Stay hixddden.

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's childhood trauma from witnessing father's murder and subsequent torture creates psychological vulnerability
investigator_wound.quote: I thought of that torchous month for years, and I thought I was over it now, apperently not.
